about.heroTitle: We engineer digital ecosystems that scale.
about.heroSubtitle: A senior-only MERN stack team shipping production-grade web apps with technical SEO.
about.storyContent:
Kraviona was founded with one mission — to bridge the gap between rapid MVP delivery and production-grade engineering. We started as a small team of MERN stack engineers in East Delhi and have since delivered 150+ projects for clients in the US, EU, UK, and APAC.

Today we are a focused group of senior developers, designers, and SEO specialists who refuse to ship anything that doesn't pass our internal quality bar.
about.storyQuote: We don't just write code; we solve complex business problems.

values.title: Uncompromising Quality
values.description: We refuse to ship bad code. Every line goes through peer review, linting, and automated tests.

values.title: Absolute Transparency
values.description: No hidden fees, no tech jargon. You get weekly demos and a clear roadmap from day one.

values.title: Continuous Innovation
values.description: The tech world moves fast — we invest 10% of every week into R&D so you don't fall behind.

about.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your project — we reply within 24 hours.

data.defaultMetaDescription: We build production-grade MERN stack web apps with technical SEO baked in.
data.defaultMetaTitle: Kraviona Tech Solutions — MERN Stack & Technical SEO
data.description: We build production-grade MERN stack apps with technical SEO baked in.

homeFaqs.question: How long does a typical MERN project take?
homeFaqs.answer: MVPs ship in 4–6 weeks; full production apps take 8–12 weeks depending on scope.

homeFaqs.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes — every project includes 30 days of free post-launch support and an optional maintenance plan.

homeFaqs.question: Can you take over an existing codebase?
homeFaqs.answer: Absolutely. We routinely inherit and modernise legacy MERN / MEAN / LAMP apps.

homeFaqs.question: Do you work with international clients?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes — we work async-first with teams across the US, EU, UK, and APAC.

homeFaqs.question: What's your pricing model?
homeFaqs.answer: Fixed-price for well-defined scopes; monthly retainer for ongoing work.

homeFaqs.question: Will my app be SEO-friendly?
homeFaqs.answer: All builds ship with Core Web Vitals tuned, structured data, and server-rendered routes by default.

homeFaqs.question: Do you sign NDAs?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes — we're happy to sign an NDA before discussing your project in detail.

homeFaqs.question: What's your tech stack preference?
homeFaqs.answer: We default to the MERN stack because of its flexibility, but adapt to your team's stack.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Flexible plans for every stage of your business.
pricing.disclaimer: All prices in INR and exclusive of GST.
